templates.name: Notify Caregiver of Shift Change
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Call caregiver and let them know that their shift has changed from [OriginalShift] to [NewShift].

fields.name: OriginalShift
fields.description: Enter the original shift date and time.

fields.name: NewShift
fields.description: Enter the new shift date and time.

templates.name: Notify Client of Shift Change
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Call client to notify them that their original shift on [DateTimeOriginal] has been changed to [DateTimeNew].

templates.name: Caregiver No-Show
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Caregiver did not arrive for scheduled shift on [ShiftDate]. Attempt to contact caregiver and arrange replacement coverage for client.

fields.name: ShiftDate
fields.description: Enter the date and time of the missed shift.

templates.name: Caregiver Called Out Sick
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Caregiver called out sick for shift on [ShiftDate]. Find replacement coverage and notify client of caregiver change.

fields.name: ShiftDate
fields.description: Enter the date and time of the shift that needs coverage.

templates.name: Caregiver Certification Expiring
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Caregiver's [CertificationType] certification is expiring on [ExpirationDate]. Contact caregiver to remind them to renew and submit updated documentation.

fields.name: CertificationType
fields.description: Select the type of certification that is expiring.

fields.name: ExpirationDate
fields.description: Enter the date the certification expires.

templates.name: Caregiver Incident Report
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Caregiver reported an incident on [IncidentDate] at client's location. Incident type: [IncidentType]. Details: [IncidentDetails].

fields.name: IncidentDate
fields.description: Enter the date and time the incident occurred.

fields.name: IncidentType
fields.description: Select the type of incident.

fields.name: IncidentDetails
fields.description: Briefly describe what occurred.

templates.name: New Caregiver Orientation
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Schedule and conduct new caregiver orientation on [OrientationDate]. Cover company policies, procedures, documentation requirements, and client care expectations.

fields.name: OrientationDate
fields.description: Enter the scheduled date and time for orientation.

templates.name: Caregiver Performance Note
templates.subject: Caregiver
templates.text: Performance note recorded on [NoteDate]. Type: [PerformanceType]. Details: [NoteDetails].

fields.name: NoteDate
fields.description: Enter the date of this performance note.

fields.name: PerformanceType
fields.description: Select whether this is a positive or corrective note.

fields.name: NoteDetails
fields.description: Describe the performance observation.

templates.name: New Client Intake
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Complete intake process for new client. Scheduled service start date: [ServiceStartDate]. Assign caregiver, review care plan, and confirm emergency contacts are on file.

fields.name: ServiceStartDate
fields.description: Enter the date services are scheduled to begin.

templates.name: Client Hospitalization
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client was hospitalized on [HospitalizationDate] at [HospitalName]. Services placed on hold. Follow up with family for discharge updates and expected return to service.

fields.name: HospitalizationDate
fields.description: Enter the date the client was hospitalized.

fields.name: HospitalName
fields.description: Enter the name of the hospital.

templates.name: Client Complaint
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client filed a complaint on [ComplaintDate] regarding [ComplaintCategory]. Details: [ComplaintDetails]. Follow up to investigate and resolve.

fields.name: ComplaintDate
fields.description: Enter the date the complaint was received.

fields.name: ComplaintCategory
fields.description: Select the category that best describes the complaint.

fields.name: ComplaintDetails
fields.description: Briefly describe the client's complaint.

templates.name: Client Service Pause
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client requested a service hold from [PauseStartDate] to [PauseEndDate]. Reason: [Reason]. Notify assigned caregiver(s) and update schedule accordingly.

fields.name: PauseStartDate
fields.description: Enter the first date services will be on hold.

fields.name: PauseEndDate
fields.description: Enter the date services are expected to resume.

fields.name: Reason
fields.description: Enter the reason the client is pausing services.

templates.name: Client End of Service
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client services ended on [EndDate]. Reason for discharge: [DischargeReason]. Notify assigned caregivers and close out scheduling.

fields.name: EndDate
fields.description: Enter the final date of service for this client.

fields.name: DischargeReason
fields.description: Select the reason services are ending.

templates.name: Client Wellness Check Call
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Place a wellness check call to client on [CallDate]. Document client's status, any concerns raised, and whether any follow-up action is needed.

fields.name: CallDate
fields.description: Enter the date of the wellness check call.

templates.name: Update Client Emergency Contact
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client's emergency contact information was updated. New contact: [ContactName], Relationship: [Relationship], Phone: [ContactPhone].

fields.name: ContactName
fields.description: Enter the name of the emergency contact.

fields.name: Relationship
fields.description: Enter the contact's relationship to the client.

fields.name: ContactPhone
fields.description: Enter the emergency contact's phone number.

templates.name: Client Care Plan Update
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Client care plan was updated on [UpdateDate]. Changes made: [ChangesSummary]. Notify assigned caregiver(s) of updated instructions.

fields.name: UpdateDate
fields.description: Enter the date the care plan was updated.

fields.name: ChangesSummary
fields.description: Briefly describe what was changed in the care plan.

templates.name: Billing Follow-Up
templates.subject: Customer
templates.text: Follow up with client regarding outstanding balance on invoice from [InvoiceDate]. Amount due: [AmountDue]. Confirm payment arrangement or escalate as needed.

fields.name: InvoiceDate
fields.description: Enter the date of the outstanding invoice.

fields.name: AmountDue
fields.description: Enter the outstanding balance amount.
